scripts.gen: npm run generate:icons && npm run generate:exports
scripts.dev: npm run gen && tsup --watch & npm run types --watch & postbuild --watch
scripts.build: npm run gen && tsup && npm run types && npm run postbuild
scripts.generate:icons: touch src/index.ts && mkdir -p src/components && svgr --no-prettier --config-file .svgrrc.js src/icons --out-dir src/components && node ./src/scripts/generate-rtl-icons.js
